# Lily's Secret

> Bespoke, hand-poured candles from the UAE with a secret personal message hidden in the wax — revealed only as the flame burns all the way down. Fully personalised and handmade to order.

## About
Lily's Secret is a UAE-based maker of bespoke handcrafted candles. Every candle is fully personalised: the customer chooses a fragrance and writes a secret message, which is hand-set at the bottom of the glass and revealed only once the candle has burned down. Each candle is hand-poured and finished with a wax seal. The brand motto is "Patience brings the light. The flame reveals the secret."

## Key pages
- `Home → https://www.lilysecretcandles.com/`: Fragrances, how it works, the secret-message concept, occasions, and the "Create Your Candle" builder + contact.
- `Terms & Conditions → https://www.lilysecretcandles.com/terms.html`
- `Privacy Policy → https://www.lilysecretcandles.com/privacy.html`
- `Returns & Cancellations → https://www.lilysecretcandles.com/returns.html`

## Fragrances (7 signature scents)
- Exotic Dream — fruity & tropical: warm Mediterranean breeze with tropical fruit and soft musk.
- Amber Tale — warm & oriental: luxurious amber, honey and spice, like a mystical winter night.
- Velvet Coffee — gourmet & coffee: fresh coffee, creamy vanilla and bitter almond.
- Summer Sun — coconut & beach: coconut, warm sand and tropical breeze.
- Pure Silk — clean & white floral: white florals and light woody notes, fresh as washed linen.
- Sweet Escape — sugary & marshmallow: strawberry, raspberry and marshmallow.
- Istanbul Tulip — fresh & floral: a single tulip's freshness, serene as a secret palace garden.

## Key facts
- Handmade to order in the United Arab Emirates.
- 100% plant/soy wax, natural cotton wick, hand-sealed with a wax seal — a clean, even burn with no black smoke.
- Every candle hides a personal "secret message" that is revealed as the flame burns down.
- Fully bespoke: the customer chooses fragrance, secret message and occasion. No two are the same.
- Occasions served: weddings, birthdays, thank-you gifts, corporate and bulk gifting, new baby, and personal declarations.
- Ordering is consultative (no online checkout): customers build their candle and send the details, and each order is confirmed personally.
- The website is available in English, Arabic, Turkish, French, Russian and Hindi.
- Contact: hello@lilysecretcandles.com · Instagram @lillysecretcandlesdxb
